About ID43 Creative

Storytellers Built for the Outdoors

ID43 Creative is a production agency with over four decades of combined experience crafting high-impact content for brands that live and breathe the outdoors. We don't just film products, we put them in the middle of real adventures, real conditions, and real chaos.

From FPV drone footage to underwater cinematography, we have the crew, the gear, and the drive to make your product the undeniable hero of every frame.

30 Seconds. No Excuses.

The Concept

This is a visceral, fast-cut 30-second spot that takes Turtlebox from a trail to the bottom of a river, through a welding shop, to a bonfire, and proves the speaker never flinches.

Every environment is deliberately extreme. Every shot is designed to make the viewer think: the music is still going.

The Shot List

Scene by Scene

Swipe to explore →

Scene 01
River Corridor Trail
0:00 – 0:07

Opens wide on a cyclist with a Turtlebox mounted to the rear rack. Then it goes over the edge.

  • Wide tracking shot, cyclist on trail
  • Close-up mount detail, grille, logo
  • Low angle slow-mo, speaker tumbles toward river
  • Underwater splash cam, sinks with light refraction
Scene 02
Pool Party
0:08 – 0:15

Arm plunges in, pulls the speaker out still playing. Three Turtleboxes pair up in Party Mode.

  • Arm reaches in, pulls speaker from water
  • Close-up power button lights up, music resumes
  • Third speaker placed on grill grates
  • Phone screen showing three-speaker Bluetooth pairing
  • Wide handheld, crowd reacts to the volume
Scene 03
Welding Shop
0:16 – 0:21

Dimly lit garage. A welder works. Sparks cascade directly onto the speaker grille. It sits completely unbothered.

  • Wide shot, welder at work, speaker in foreground
  • Close-up slow-mo, sparks rain onto the grille
  • Tight insert, logo visible through dying sparks
Scene 04
Bonfire
0:22 – 0:29

Truck tailgate drops. Speaker hits the ground facing a massive fire pit. Pallets go up. Gas pours. The fire erupts. The music doesn't stop.

  • Medium shot, tailgate drops, speaker hits the ground
  • Wide, pallets heaved onto fire
  • Low angle wide, fire erupts, speaker silhouetted
  • Close-up grille glowing in firelight
  • Wide pull-back, group cheering, speaker front and center
Scene 05
End Card
0:29 – 0:30

Hard cut to black. Turtlebox logo and product shot land precisely on the final beat of the music.

  • Black card, logo lock-up, product shot
  • Cut synced to the final musical beat
The Partnership

What We're Asking For

We are requesting product support in the form of one unit of each speaker model to use as production hero pieces throughout the shoot. We understand availability varies and are grateful for whatever Turtlebox is able to provide.

At minimum, the Original Gen 3 is essential for the core underwater and durability sequences. In exchange, ID43 Creative will produce and deliver a complete, broadcast-ready 30-second commercial spot.

What We're Building

The Deliverable

A fully produced 30-second commercial spot. Shot on location across multiple environments, edited with precision, and delivered ready for broadcast and social distribution.

This is a complete commercial production, the kind of content Turtlebox can run anywhere they choose.
